chat_history.content: Phase 1 — district skeleton for Alexandria (around 585). A detailed map narrative will follow in the background while we build.

scenario.description: Founded by Alexander the Great. Center of Hellenistic learning. Home of the Great Library and Pharos Lighthouse.
scenario.features: Pharos Lighthouse, Great Library/Mouseion, Serapeum, Royal Quarter (Bruchion), Heptastadion causeway, Lake Mareotis
scenario.grid_note: Coastal city on Mediterranean. Harbor to the north. Pharos island connected by causeway. Grid plan by Dinocrates.
scenario.ruler: Research who ruled and what the city looked like at this exact time
